messages.content: You're chatting with PRISM-4, a chatbot by Nexus Research. PRISM-4 is designed to simulate a meaningful conversation. You can ask it about current events, advice, trivia, etc.
Hey PRISM-4, my brother has this weird idea that climate change isn't real. I've tried explaining it to him, but he just won't listen.

Climate change can indeed be a challenging topic to discuss, especially when the other person has strong pre-existing beliefs. It might be helpful to provide evidence from credible scientific sources to substantiate your points.
Well, he doesn't trust most sources. He believes that most scientists are just after grant money. If you were me, would you
